title: Clock in the frame
description: Makes Clocks display your real time when placed on a item frame (in intervals of 5 minutes)
body:
### You ever wish you could check what time it is without existing the game? Probably you want to make sure you are in time while you play minecraft

Well worry less because I have cooked together a solution, just slap the clock in a item frame and it will reveal your system time, _it works only on intervals of 5 minutes, doing more would have killed me_
